title: Pipestation 22mm Compression Stop End Connectors (Pack of 2) | Blank Cap Brass Compression Joint Plumbing Fittings for Copper Plumbing Pipe Connectors | Brass Compressions Plumbers Pipe Fitting
features: BEST VALUE PACK - Get 2 Brass Compression Stop Ends from Pipestation, offering unbeatable value for your plumbing projects. Perfect for 22mm pipe-work jobs in both domestic and commercial settings.
EASY TO INSTALL - Our WRAS approved compression fittings require no soldering, ensuring hassle-free installation. Simply slide onto the pipe and tighten for a secure and leak-proof seal.

SOLID BRASS CONSTRUCTION - Crafted from solid brass and manufactured to EN1254 standards, our compression stop ends are highly durable and corrosion-resistant. Built to withstand high temperatures and pressure.

VERSATILE APPLICATION - These compression stop end connectors are commonly used to seal off 22mm copper pipes in water systems, providing a reliable and watertight closure. Versatile for various plumbing needs.
WHAT YOU GET - Each pack includes 2 high-quality 22mm Compression Stop End Connectors from Pipestation. Trust in our product for dependable and long-lasting plumbing solutions.
